_description: UI selectors map for Google Flow

main.title: Google Flow - AI Creative Studio for Video, Images & Custom Tools

buttons.text: Type OverlaysAdd animated text to your videos
Video ResizerResize your videos into any aspect ratio
Image EditorTransform objects, add text, and adjust image sizing with a layer ba
Storyboard StudioWrite a script, create the cast, and visualize a storyboard
Shader EffectsApply customizable visual filters to your videos and images
MockupComp your image into different environments
RibbitPerform videos live as the beat drives playback.
Character X-rayDevelop your characters and their backstory
pixelBentoApply post-processing effects like lo-fi and glitch
Grid ArchitectCreate image grids and extract individual images from them
Scout360Capture a 360 degree environment from an image

buttons.ariaLabel: Get started button for Free subscription

modelTexts: Create and edit videos from any input reference — real or generated. Omni is a leap forward in world understanding, multimodality, and conversational editing.
Veo delivers expanded creative controls, native audio, and quality videos. It excels in physics, realism and prompt adherence.
